    Teaching

    CS6103: Human-Centered AI: From Learning Models to Responsible Systems

    Spring 2026

    A graduate-level course covering AI alignment, RLHF, crowdsourcing, recommendation systems, fairness, interpretability, privacy, and AI governance.

    CS767: Theoretical Machine Learning

    Autumn 2025 | Course Website

    Topics include PAC learning, VC dimension, Rademacher complexity, online learning, bandits, and modern neural network generalization theory.

    CS6103: Human-Centered AI: From Learning Models to Responsible Systems

    Spring 2025 | Course Website
